skill: One-variable data: Distributions and measures of center and spread
stem:
12, 14, 17, 19, 23, 28, 31, 34, 40

What is the median of the data shown?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. The median of a data set with an odd number of values, ordered from least to greatest, is the middle value. There are 9 values, so the median is the 5th value, which is 23.

Choice A is incorrect: 12 is the minimum.

Choice B is incorrect: 19 is the 4th value.

Choice D is incorrect: 26 is not in the set.
